rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF MAYLENE CHAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Authority To List And Sell Conservatee'S Real Property And To Enter Exclusive Listing Agreement With Real Estate Agent
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing.

rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF LINDA T. KEEGAN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petition For Substituted Judgment To Create And Execute Revocable Trust And Pour Over Will And To Transfer Conservatorship Assets To Trust
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 12/20/2022 by the assigned judicial officer after review who directed this tentative ruling to be issued. Papers addressing the following issues must be filed, and courtesy copies of such papers must be delivered, no later than noon on 12/13/2022: 1) court-appointed attorney's written report; 2) capacity standard for execution of proposed trust and will, and evidence of present lack of capacity; 3) evidence supporting allegation that conservatee is highly unlikely to regain capacity; 4) additional explanation as to whether expenses of administration will be truly minimized by proposed trust, given eventual need for petition to determine maternal heirs and ongoing additional trustee/attorney services required for supervised trust case, in addition to conservatorship case; 5) revision of proposed trust document to specifically state: i) trust is under court supervision; ii) biennial (rather than annual) accountings, after first account; and iii) prior court approval for trustee to sell or encumber real property.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF EDMUND SHEFFIELD
rulings.Calendar Matter: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Close Of Estate
rulings.Rulings: Hearing. Appearance required. Counsel to provide the court a valid reason for the delay of more than 7 years in closing adminsitration of estate, without an interim accounting. PARTIES APPEARING SHOULD CHECK IN FOR THE HEARING WITH THEIR FULL NAME. Counsel and parties may appear personally or remotely through Zoom or CourtCall. For a video appearance, go to zoom.us, click "join a meeting" and input meeting ID 160 225 4765 and password 514879. For an audio-only appearance through Zoom, call 1-669-254-5252 and key in meeting ID "160 225 4765#", then participant ID "0#", then password "514879#". (Toll rates may apply).) The Court prefers that counsel and parties appearing by video input their first and last name into the "Your Name" dialogue box. Counsel and parties may appear by audio-only telephone through CourtCall by calling 1-888-882-6878. Counsel or parties appearing in person must wear a mask covering their nose and mouth at all times while in the courthouse. Please review LRSF 14.1(D) for more information.
